intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 92% for 30s. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 92% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 92% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 30s at 105%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 105% at 88-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 30s at 105%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 58 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 11 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/3. 15% complete. Hold 92% steady. 59 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 30s at 92%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 92% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 16% complete. Block 1/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 30s at 105%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 16% complete. Block 1/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 11 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 30s at 92%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 2min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 88-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 92% for 0:30. You can hold this. Trust your training.
